rows.text: Mahanadi Coalfields Limited (MCL), Odisha Assistant Foreman, Technician Vacancy 2026 Short Details of Advertisement Notification
Notification Out : 16/04/2026 Starting Date : 07/05/2026 Last Date : 28/05/2026 11:50 PM
Gen / OBC / EWS : 1180/- SC / ST / ESM : 0/- PH / All Females : 0/- CIL Employees : 0/- Payment Mode : Online Mode
Age Limit : 18-30 Years Age Limit as on : 28/05/2026 The Age Relaxation Extra as per Rules.
Assistant Foreman (Electrical) Trainee : Basic Pay Rs. 47330.25/- Per Month Technician (Electrician) Trainee : Basic Pay Rs. 1583.32/- Per Month
Computer-Based Test (CBT) Medical Examination Document Verification

Assistant Foreman (Electrical) Trainee : Diploma in Electrical Engineering OR Degree in Electrical/ Electronics Engineering. Technician (Electrician) Trainee : 10th Passed, 02 Years ITI in Electrician Trade with 01 Year Experience and LT permit under IE rules for Mines or 440-550 Volts Mining parts Permit issued by Competent Authority.
